definition: The path factor of sustaining one's life in ways that do not depend on harm or deception.
notes: The project keeps right livelihood as the default because it is standard and clear enough in contemporary English. Appropriate livelihood may work in explanatory prose where the practical and contextual dimension needs emphasis.

context_rules.context: In explanatory prose focusing on livelihood that accords with the path
context_rules.notes: Acceptable alternate when the line reads better.

example_phrases.notes: Useful contrast showing the factor's ethical polarity.
